issues.description: Missing condition: effect requires revealing 2 cards with type including 'Whitebeard Pirates' from hand as a cost/condition. DSL lacks Optional reveal condition.
Target scope incomplete: effect targets 'Up to 1 of your Leader' with type including 'Whitebeard Pirates', but target only specifies 'OwnLeader' without the type requirement filter.
Wrong duration: text states '[Your Turn]' which indicates duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. This is a critical timing difference.
